title: Is there a way to add all items to an email when they are set to a certain status?
excerpt:

we do have multiple groups on the board, separating them into inks/rigged materials/media. we would like to keep it that way as …

posts.author: Sabre (Jake)
posts.cookedHtml:
So I’m trying to create an automatic email to my boss when certain items are out of stock.

we do have multiple groups on the board, separating them into inks/rigged materials/media. we would like to keep it that way as well.

my goal is to have all the items on the board that has a status of ‘Consider ordering’ sent in 1 email every 7 days.

when i did a test it sent the email and push the date back 7 days like i wanted but everything got sent individually.

monday-emails2459×2880 151 KB

is there a way that all these can be added into the 1 email? (partly because we only have 250 automations a month but mainly because it would just neater and more convenient)
